blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this path! Job well done!

You have successfully:

- Navigated to the Notification policies page
- Configured the Group by setting to control which alerts are batched together
- Adjusted the three timing options: group wait, group interval, and repeat interval
- Saved the updated notification policy

---

### More to explore

Now that you've configured grouping and timing, explore these related tasks:

- [Edit the default notification policy](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/alerting-edit-default-policy/) to change the fallback contact point
- [Create a child notification policy](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/alerting-create-child-policy/) to route specific alerts to dedicated contact points
- [Notification policies documentation](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/alerting/fundamentals/notifications/notification-policies/) for the full reference
